title: Mastech Holdings is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Mastech Holdings is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Mastech Holdings, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Navi Mumbai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Mastech Holdings:
Mastech Holdings is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mastech Holdings!
